subject: Discrete Random Variables
topic: §14 Probability Mass Function and Cumulative Distribution Function
question: A game consists of randomly selecting two balls without replacement from an urn containing 3 red balls and 4 blue balls. If the two selected balls are of the same color then you win $2. If they are of different colors then you lose $1. Let $X$ denote your gain/loss. Find the probability mass function of $X$.
